title: Can't Sort first column on mobile app
excerpt:
I can’t find a way to sort the first column on the mobile app.  I have a 2 column sort saved and working on the browser app, but the mobile app ignores the sorting of the first main column. 
Ideas?

posts.author: mharding7va (Michael Harding)
posts.cookedHtml:
I can’t find a way to sort the first column on the mobile app. I have a 2 column sort saved and working on the browser app, but the mobile app ignores the sorting of the first main column.

Ideas?

posts.author: thebrochproject (Robin Herrick)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to do the same thing. There doesn’t seem to be any column sort in the mobile app.
